diagnostic_history.error: WindowsAppSDK runtime not installed on CI runner — Bootstrap::Initialize failed at startup; app process exited immediately with no window.
diagnostic_history.fix_applied: Added WindowsAppSDKSelfContained=true + SelfContained=true to dotnet publish to embed AppSDK DLLs in output directory, eliminating the runtime-installer dependency.

diagnostic_history.error: gRPC codegen ordering: x:Bind ViewModels referenced Colimaui types before Grpc.Tools generated them, causing XamlPreCompile MSB3073.
diagnostic_history.fix_applied: Added ProtoBeforeXaml MSBuild target (BeforeTargets=XamlPreCompile;CoreCompile, DependsOnTargets=Protobuf_Compile) and csharp_namespace=Colimaui option to proto Protobuf item.

diagnostic_history.error: ReadAllAsync not found — Grpc.Core.AsyncStreamReader does not expose ReadAllAsync in the version used; required explicit using.
diagnostic_history.fix_applied: Added global <Using Include="Grpc.Core" /> to csproj so ReadAllAsync extension from Grpc.Core namespace resolves without per-file using directives.

diagnostic_history.result: 10/13 surfaces captured. Dashboard + 9 visible nav items succeeded via Click(). Bottom 3 items (Monitoring, Settings & Deps, and one other) were offscreen with zero bounding rect — NoClickablePointException. SelectionItem/LegacyIA fallbacks did not trigger WinUI3 frame navigation.
diagnostic_history.fix_applied: none (this was the high-water mark run)

diagnostic_history.error: Regression to 1/13: Dashboard captured (initial selected page), then ALL other nav items failed. Root cause: NavigateToItem was rewritten to try SelectionItemPattern.Select() FIRST for all items. WinUI3 NavigationView does NOT raise SelectionChanged or trigger frame navigation via UIA SelectionItemPattern — it requires actual pointer input (Click). Select() returned success but nav content never changed, so all 12 remaining surfaces showed zero elements or were stale-window failures.
diagnostic_history.fix_applied: Pass 6 (this fix): Restored Click-first strategy. Dashboard (index 0) skips navigation entirely (capture initial selected page). Visible items: Click() first. Offscreen items: ScrollIntoView → re-resolve mainWindow + navItem (captured navAutomationId string eagerly before scroll to avoid stale COM reads) → Click() → SelectionItem/LegacyIA fallback only if still unclickable. Re-resolve mainWindow every iteration to avoid stale UIA element handles after layout changes.

environment_note: Windows UIAutomation ground-truth capture requires a running Windows GUI session. This host is macOS; runtime capture is validated by CI (explore-windows workflow on windows-latest runner). This file is updated diagnostically after each CI pass until the app launches successfully and FlaUI exploration completes.
next_step: CI run with pass-6 fix applied. Expected: Dashboard captured via initial-page path; 10 visible items navigated via Click(); 3 offscreen items via ScrollIntoView+re-resolve+Click(); all 13/13 surfaces nonzero. Target: 13/13 = SUCCESS.
